block_01: Ever wanted to trade like the world’s most successful investor? Warren Buffett has a couple of secrets to reveal. The investing guru has stated more than once that the assets you pick will determine the profit you receive.
block_02: Take a closer look at the Warren Buffett portfolio to try and emulate his success. Read the full article to learn about companies that let the Oracle of Omaha go from $140.000 to $81.5 billion.
